title: HttpClient interceptor → Axios map
description: PLAN.md §154. Maps the Angular HttpClient interceptor chain (auth headers, retry, error mapping, cancellation) onto the single shared Axios instance + OpenAPI typescript-axios client.

sharedInstance.description: Identifier of the single shared Axios instance all BFF access flows through.

order.description: Position in the Angular chain; preserved order matters for correctness.

appliesTo.description: URL patterns the interceptor acts on ('*' = all).

axiosStage.description: Where the equivalent hangs on the shared Axios instance.

axiosEquivalent.description: Name/path of the Axios request/response interceptor or adapter implementing this concern.

status.description: unmapped → mapped (equivalent written) → verified (parity test passes, incl. retry/cancellation/error-shape).
